wordplay_note: Runs the Lies Incorporated deception apparatus
card_description: Matson (Theodore) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Lies Inc.*. Head of an organization that manufactures disinformation. Name note: Runs the Lies Incorporated deception apparatus. The professional liar — an entire industry of deception. First appears in *Lies Inc.*.

reference.brief: Head of an organization that manufactures disinformation
reference.significance: The professional liar — an entire industry of deception
